$comment: Design-catalog spec for the OpenScan mobile design system. Code-led: it declares which @Preview composables (by function name) make up the published sticker sheet. Consumed by @design-parity/catalog-export over a `compose-preview bundle pack --module :app` render to produce the importable design-artifacts/openscan-android bundle the public preview server serves at /openscan-android/. Each `preview` MUST equal the exact @Preview function name in :app (ee.schimke.openscan.app.ui.ComponentPreviews / ThemeFoundationPreviews).
title: OpenScan Mobile
